curation_notes: The patch adds a new NamespaceReconciler controller that enforces pod security admission labels on user namespaces (prefixed with 'ns-'). It also registers this controller in the user controller's main entrypoint. The vulnerability location is the main function where the missing controller registration left user namespaces without pod security enforcement. Only 2 files were changed (1 new file, 1 modified), neither being test files.
